projeto: Curso Adestramento Canino - Aula 1: Comando SENTA
descricao: Primeira aula do curso ensinando o comando básico SENTA para cães

cenas.descricao: Abertura - Logo do curso com cachorro sentado
cenas.dalle_prompt: Professional dog training course logo, golden retriever sitting perfectly in obedience position, clean white background, modern minimalist design, cinematic lighting, 4K quality, studio photography style
cenas.grok_movement: Slow zoom into the logo, subtle light particles floating, elegant reveal animation

cenas.descricao: Apresentação do instrutor - Pessoa com cachorro
cenas.dalle_prompt: Friendly dog trainer in professional attire, kneeling beside a happy golden retriever in a sunny park, warm natural lighting, welcoming atmosphere, photorealistic, cinematic composition, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Gentle pan from left to right, trainer turns to face camera, dog wags tail naturally

cenas.descricao: Explicação do comando SENTA - Texto animado
cenas.dalle_prompt: Modern infographic showing the word SENTA in bold typography, dog paw print icon, clean gradient background purple to blue, professional educational design, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Text animates in from left, paw print appears with bounce effect, subtle background movement

cenas.dalle_prompt: Side view of golden retriever in perfect sit position, trainer holding treat above dog's head, outdoor training field, natural lighting, clear body posture demonstration, photorealistic, 4K
cenas.grok_movement: Camera slowly orbits around the dog, showing perfect posture from multiple angles

cenas.dalle_prompt: Close-up of trainer's hand holding a small dog treat, positioned above a dog's nose, soft focus background, warm lighting, instructional photography style, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow zoom into the hand position, focus pulls from background to treat

cenas.descricao: Passo 2 - Mover a mão para trás
cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer moving treat from dog's nose upwards and backwards, dog's head following the treat, natural sitting motion, outdoor setting, golden hour lighting, photorealistic, 4K
cenas.grok_movement: Smooth tracking shot following the hand movement, dog naturally sits down

cenas.dalle_prompt: Golden retriever completing the sit motion, rear touching ground, trainer rewarding with treat, happy expression, park background, warm natural lighting, photorealistic, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Camera captures the moment of sitting, trainer gives treat, dog wags tail

cenas.dalle_prompt: Split screen showing correct vs incorrect training technique, green checkmark and red X icons, professional educational design, modern infographic style, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Left side shows correct technique with green glow, right side fades with red indicator

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer practicing sit command with dog multiple times, showing repetition and consistency, sunny training field, positive energy, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Montage style smooth transitions between practice repetitions, dog improves each time

cenas.dalle_prompt: Clean summary infographic with 3 steps numbered, dog sitting illustration, modern flat design, purple and blue color scheme, professional educational layout, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Each step appears sequentially with smooth animation, final summary builds up

cenas.descricao: Próxima aula - Preview do comando DEITA
cenas.dalle_prompt: Teaser for next lesson, golden retriever in down position, text DEITA floating, exciting preview design, gradient background, professional course branding, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Smooth transition revealing the next command, dog moves from sit to down position

cenas.descricao: Encerramento - Logo e chamada para ação
cenas.dalle_prompt: Course ending screen with logo, subscribe button, social media icons, happy dog and trainer silhouette, warm sunset colors, professional outro design, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Fade to warm colors, logo reveals, call to action appears with gentle animation
